Scanned the QR? You're in the right place.

Welcome in.

We design and print custom apparel — tees, hoodies, and more — made to your exact style, fit, and fabric, right here in our Quezon City studio. While we get your order started, take a look around.

or press Enter on your keyboard
What happens next
Your walk-in visit
1
Browse the rack
Check style, fit, and fabric in person near the entrance.
2
Fill up your order
Pick your design, color, print, and size on the form.
3
We handle the rest
Sample approval, quotation, and updates by email.
Takes about 10–15 minutes in-store
Step 1 of 3 · Browse

Check out
the rack.

Our display near the entrance is arranged by Style → Fit → Size, so it's easy to find what you're after. Feel the fabric, check the fit, and note the tag for anything you like — you'll enter it in your order.

Need a hand? Any staff member is happy to guide you around — no pressure to order yet.

Ready when you are — takes about 3 minutes.

Step 2 of 3 · Assistance

Do you need help from
one of our staff?

Staff can guide you around the store and help with product options — they won't process your order for you directly.

Guided to Staff

Head to Station 4 — CSR

A Customer Service staff member will help you with product recommendations and guide you through your order. Please proceed to Station 4 (CSR) shown below.

Go here Also on your way
Step 3 of 3 · Order Form

Build Your Order

Everything's on this one page — fill in what you can, and our team will confirm the rest with you before production.

Apparel
What are you ordering?
Style
Fit

Fabric & Color

Design & Print
Print details

If you'd rather not upload it yourself, our in-house graphic artist can help you build it in person — no extra charge to sit down and talk it through.

Head to Station 5 — Graphic Artist

No need to leave this page — keep filling out the rest of your order whenever you're ready. Just walk over to Station 5 and one of our artists will help sketch out your design in person. Come back here to finish and submit once you're done.

Drop your design file, or skip for now
No design yet? You can still send it later to sales@sorbetes.ph — or change your mind above and talk to a graphic artist at Station 5.
